docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,450.00 FILED BY MENDOZA, JOSUE REA, SONIA AS TO DEFENDANT BINZARI, RADU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-25-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BINZARI, RADU

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2025 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL TIME TO REVIEW EVIDENCE/EXHIBITS TO OCT-03-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS JOSUE MENDOZA AND SONIA REA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAGU BINZARI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS SERVED IN COURT BY PLAINTIFF'S WIFE (SONIA REA). PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WAIVED ANY FURTHER NOTICE OF HEARING. DEFENDANT CALLED PLAINTIFF'S ATTENTION THAT HIS (DEFENDANT) NAME WAS WRITTEN INCORRECTLY ON THE COMPLAINT. THE PLAINTIFF WAS INSTRUCTED BY JUDGE ZEPEDA TO PROCEED TO DEPT 103 AND FILE AN AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: FOR REVIEW OF ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE
DECLARATION AMENDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, JOSUE REA, SONIA
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,450.00 FILED BY MENDOZA, JOSUE REA, SONIA AS TO DEFENDANT BINZARI, RADU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE . APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS JOSUE MENDOZA AND SONIA REA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT RADU BINZARI IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, JOSUE REA, SONIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BINZARI, RADU $5,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,525.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
